title: Background Relax
description: Adds a background with a calm and peaceful scenery.
body:
# Background Relax

Background Relax adds a soothing and tranquil background to your Minecraft menu, creating a peaceful atmosphere every time you play.

![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14fb25bf59ec2365a5909712af42fc19d86e06c4.png)

### Adicional resource packs used in Screenshot
- [Cool Font "finished"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cool-font-finished)
